examples.name: Show track output with IPv6 route reachability
examples.input:
Track 1
  IPv6 Route 10:1::1:2/32 Reachability
  Reachability is DOWN
  1 changes, last change 1w2d

examples.name: Imported from Genie ShowTrack (equal)
examples.input:
Track 3
  Interface Ethernet1/3 Line Protocol
  Line Protocol is DOWN
  1 changes, last change 3w5d

Track 4
  IP Route 10.1.1.1/32 Reachability
  Reachability is DOWN
  1 changes, last change 3w4d

examples.name: Imported from Genie ShowTrack (equal)
examples.input:
Track 1
  Interface Ethernet1/4 IP Routing
  IP Routing is DOWN
  1 changes, last change 3w5d
  Tracked by:
    HSRP Vlan2 2
    HSRP Ethernet1/1 1
    VRRPV3 Vlan2 2
    Track List  10
    Track List  11
    Track List  12
    Route Map Configuration
  Delay up 20 secs

Track 12
  List  Threshold weight
  Threshold weight is DOWN
  1 changes, last change 3w3d
  Threshold weight up 20 down 10
  Track List Members:
  object 10 weight 10 UP
  object 1 weight 100 DOWN

Track 13
  Interface loopback1 Line Protocol
  Line Protocol is DOWN
  2 changes, last change 3w3d
  Delay up 23 secs, down 24 secs
